contract.description: Contract sync definition migrated from legacy recipe bundle.

notes: Contract still contains inferred rule and step scope that require deliberate review.

tables.name: core.Contract
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.Pipeline
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.ContractColumn
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.Dataset
tables.predicate: contractId = {id}

tables.name: core.Step
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Pipeline] p WHERE p.pipelineId = [core].[Step].pipelineId AND p.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.Activity
tables.predicate: pipelineId IN (SELECT pipelineId FROM [core].[Pipeline] WHERE contractId = {id})

tables.name: core.DatasetColumn
tables.predicate: datasetId IN (SELECT datasetId FROM [core].[Dataset] WHERE contractId = {id})

tables.name: core.DatasetMapping
tables.predicate: datasetId_Left IN (SELECT datasetId FROM [core].[Dataset] WHERE contractId = {id})

tables.name: core.Rule
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[Dataset] p WHERE p.datasetId = [core].[Rule].inputDatasetId AND p.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.DatasetMappingColumn
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN (SELECT datasetId FROM core.Dataset WHERE contractId = {id}) )

tables.name: core.RuleColumn
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p INNER JOIN [core].[Dataset] _p1 ON _p1.datasetId = p.lookupDatasetId WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleColumn].inputDatasetColumnId AND _p1.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleCondition
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p INNER JOIN [core].[Dataset] _p1 ON _p1.datasetId = p.lookupDatasetId WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleCondition].inputDatasetColumnId AND _p1.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleLink
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[DatasetColumn] p INNER JOIN [core].[Dataset] _p1 ON _p1.datasetId = p.lookupDatasetId WHERE p.datasetColumnId = [core].[RuleLink].outputDatasetColumnId AND _p1.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [core].[RuleCondition] p INNER JOIN [core].[DatasetColumn] _p1 ON _p1.datasetColumnId = p.inputDatasetColumnId INNER JOIN [core].[Dataset] _p2 ON _p2.datasetId = _p1.lookupDatasetId WHERE p.ruleConditionId = [core].[RuleConditionValue].ruleConditionId AND _p2.contractId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncCoreObjectsTran body.

tables.name: gate.ContentLink

tables.name: gate.UserGroupPermission

notes: All current rule tables are verified; assign a named owner when the operating team is finalized.

tables.name: core.Rule
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleColumn
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleCondition
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleLink
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: ruleConditionId IN (SELECT ruleConditionId FROM [core].[RuleCondition] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})))

tables.name: core.DatasetMappingColumn
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN ( (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})) ) )))

tables.name: core.DatasetMapping
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN ( (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})) ) )))

tables.name: core.DatasetColumn
tables.predicate: datasetId IN (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}))))

tables.name: core.Dataset
tables.predicate: datasetId IN (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}))))

tables.name: core.RuleLinkType
tables.predicate: ruleLinkTypeId IN (SELECT ruleLinkTypeId FROM [core].[RuleLink] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})))

tables.name: core.RuleType
tables.predicate: ruleTypeId IN (SELECT ruleTypeId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})))
